WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
InputMethodContext
Virtual methods
filter_key_event focus_in focus_out get_preedit_string reset set_cursor_area set_surrounding

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Virtual Method

WPEPlatformInputMethodContextfilter_key_event

Declaration [src] 

gboolean
filter_key_event (
  WPEInputMethodContext* context,
  WPEEvent* event
)

Description [src]

Allow an input method to internally handle key press and release events. If this function returns TRUE, then no further processing should be done for this key event.

Parameters

event

Type: WPEEvent

The key event.

The data is owned by the caller of the function.

Return value

Type: gboolean

TRUE if the input method handled the key event.
